sourceNotes: Scores came from the provided world_cup_2026_group_stage_results JSON.
Fixture IDs, match numbers, teams, dates, and venues came from fixtures(3).json.
Team-name differences were normalised: Türkiye/Turkiye, Curaçao/Curacao, Côte d'Ivoire/Cote d’Ivoire, Congo DR/DR Congo, IR Iran/Iran.
Discipline/fair-play values are null because they were not present in the provided result data.

tiebreakerSupport.note: The included scores are enough to calculate normal group tables. Add discipline values only if an official tie requires fair-play comparison.

discipline.notes: Not included in provided FIFA/source JSON. Leave null unless you add official fair-play data.
